Technical Stack

Tools, languages, and platforms I use to build and lead.

Languages

  • TypeScript
  • JavaScript
  • Go
  • Python
  • SQL

Frontend

  • React
  • Next.js
  • Astro
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Storybook

Backend & APIs

  • Node.js
  • Express
  • GraphQL
  • REST
  • gRPC

Data & Storage

  • PostgreSQL
  • Redis
  • MongoDB
  • Elasticsearch

Infrastructure

  • AWS
  • Docker
  • Kubernetes
  • Terraform
  • GitHub Actions

Observability

  • Datadog
  • Sentry
  • OpenTelemetry
  • Grafana
  • Prometheus

Accessibility & Testing

  • Jest
  • Playwright
  • Cypress
  • axe-core
  • Lighthouse

Design & Collaboration

  • Figma
  • Linear
  • Notion
  • GitHub
  • Slack

"The stack serves the problem — not the other way around. I pick the right tool for the job, not the shiniest one."
